title: Schema Reference Docs
goal: Implement GitHub issues #631 and #633 from checked-in planning rather than executing directly from the tracker.
Generate deterministic Markdown reference documentation from annotated JSON Schemas, starting with workspace_config.schema.json.
Add a lightweight annotation coverage check that starts with workspace_config.schema.json and can expand to other schemas later.
non_goals: Do not build a full documentation site.
Do not annotate every schema in this slice.
Do not make generated docs authoritative over the JSON Schemas.

intent.outcome: A generated workspace config schema reference plus coverage guardrails for generator-useful annotations.
intent.constraints: Keep docs generated from schema annotations; keep rollout incremental beyond workspace_config.schema.json.
intent.latitude: Choose docs/reference or docs/generated, script shape, check wiring, and focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if implementing #631 or #633 requires broad schema rewrites or a documentation site.

execution.next_step: Close #631 and #633 after commit and push.
execution.proof: Schema reference tests, generator freshness/annotation check, contract tooling, structured inventory, strict planning surfaces, maintainer surfaces, full workspace tests/lint, and make check passed.

invariants: Generated reference docs derive from schema annotations.
Coverage enforcement starts with workspace_config.schema.json and remains expandable.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: All public, package, adapter, and maintainer-facing JSON Schemas eventually carry enough annotations for useful generated reference documentation.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: GitHub issues #631 and #633 until closed; follow-up work should be captured in issues or state.toml.

required_continuation.activation trigger: Additional schemas become annotated enough to add to generated reference docs.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: First generated schema reference page and a coverage pattern.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Rendering every schema and building a docs site.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The generator can use one schema=output target shape and an incremental annotation policy without forcing all schemas into the first enforcement set.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Add additional annotated schemas to the generated reference set.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement both docs issues.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Move #631 and #633 into checked-in planning, then ship both together.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: One checked-in execplan for generator plus annotation coverage check.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm generated docs stay reference-shaped and do not duplicate narrative docs.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Generator/check scripts, Makefile, tests, docs/reference or docs/generated, workspace config contract doc link, schema reference inputs, and this planning state.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Keep changes to the generator/check/docs/test surface needed for #631 and #633.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; selected tests; make maintainer-surfaces; make check
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before restructuring docs generation or annotation conventions across all schemas.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated README/startup drift unless the selected checks require it.

stop_conditions.stop when: The implementation needs broad schema annotation beyond workspace_config.schema.json.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A useful generator cannot be built without a larger docs framework.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Files outside docs generation/checking become necessary.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Selected proof failures point to unrelated drift.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, #631, #633, workspace_config.schema.json, docs generation/check patterns, and focused tests.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan and state.toml before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Only if narrow routing points to a relevant memory note.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implement generated schema reference docs and annotation coverage checks.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not skip ingestion; keep generated docs derived from schema annotations.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Docs home, script names, check shape, and tests.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The issues conflict or require redesigning the docs stack.

references.label: #631 [Docs]: Generate lightweight Markdown reference docs from JSON Schemas
#633 [Docs]: Add schema annotation coverage checks for generated references

active_milestone.scope: Generated workspace config schema reference and annotation coverage check.

immediate_next_action: Inspect docs generation and check patterns, then implement generator/check/tests.
invariants: JSON Schema remains the source of truth for generated field references.
The coverage check must allow incremental rollout.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Initial generated docs home and check interface.
open_questions_to_close: Use docs/reference or docs/generated for the initial generated page.
Where to wire regeneration and coverage checks.
completion_criteria: A generated Markdown reference for workspace_config.schema.json exists under the chosen docs home.
The generator can accept schema paths so future schemas can be added without redesign.
A deterministic check verifies generated docs freshness and annotation coverage for workspace_config.schema.json.
Docs or contract links point readers to the generated reference where useful.
Issues #631 and #633 are closed after validation and push.

execution_run.notes: Implemented generated workspace config schema reference docs and annotation coverage checks.

commands: uv run ruff check src tests

finished_run_review.summary: Issues #631 and #633 landed as one bounded docs slice. The generated reference is derived from schema annotations, and coverage/freshness checks are wired into maintainer surfaces.
